patch.value:
## Context
From MEMORY.md 'Architecture' section:
'When adding a command file: to find EVERY wiring site, grep -rn "<recent-command>" src/ docs/ for a recently-added command and replicate each. Sites: commands/index.ts (export), register-mutation.ts (registration + subcommand dispatch), src/mcp/server.ts (action case), src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts (PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES, PM_TOOL_ACTIONS, *_FLAG_CONTRACTS + dispatch, PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS, param props/metadata), commands/contracts.ts, completion.ts (bash auto + zsh/fish hand-maintained lists), docs (COMMANDS/AGENT_GUIDE), CHANGELOG [Unreleased], vitest.config.ts. Coverage tactic: put pure logic in a small src/core/** module added to include (100% cover it); put the command file in BOTH include and exclude so it’s not gated.'

This is high-value institutional knowledge not in any committed document.

## Acceptance criteria
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md has a 'Adding a new command: wiring checklist' section listing all 10+ sites
- The coverage tactic (include-only vs include+exclude) is documented alongside the checklist
- The checklist cross-references relevant source files so it stays findable by grep

## Evidence
Memory notes (MEMORY.md): 'When adding a command file'; docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: no such section; grep of docs/ for 'wiring checklist': 0 results
Add wiring-checklist reference card to ARCHITECTURE.md for new command authors

Adding a new command involves wiring in 10+ separate locations across src/ and docs/. This checklist is tracked only in project MEMORY.md, not in any committed doc. Contributors without session memory will miss wiring sites and create silently broken commands.

- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md has a 'Adding a new command: wiring checklist' section listing all 10+ sites
- The coverage tactic (include-only vs include+exclude) is documented alongside the checklist
- The checklist cross-references relevant source files so it stays findable by grep

value.note: New Adding a Command (Wiring Checklist) section under Command Contracts

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Added an Adding a Command or Flag (Wiring Checklist) section to ARCHITECTURE.md enumerating the 9 wiring sites (commander register-*, commands barrel/orphan gate, cli-contracts flag registries + NO_SURFACE, MCP tool-definitions, command_option_policies, dep-audit scope, docs+completions, contracts:update snapshot, coverage) with verification commands. Promotes the checklist out of session MEMORY into a committed doc. Implemented in PR (docs accuracy & contributor-reference hardening). Verified: docs-skills-gate passed, doc unit specs (66) passed, quality:static passed, manual temp-dir smoke passed.

patch.value: Command/flag wiring checklist is now a committed ARCHITECTURE.md reference card, not session-only memory.
Wiring checklist documented for new command authors.
